title: dubautia latifolia
intro: Dubautia latifolia, also known as the Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and other parts of the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dubautia latifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dubautia latifolia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used topically to treat skin irritations and infections.
